meta.update_definition: An update = one active build day's batch of shipped work. Each update expands to the individual commits (iterations) that made it up.
meta.time_method: Active build time estimated by sessionizing commit timestamps: consecutive commits within 30 min count as continuous work; gaps >30 min end a session. Sum of session spans.
meta.ai_cost_note: Grok flat subscription — marginal cost per build ~ $0.
